label: Kepler
_note: Operator-authored build spine for the Kepler vertical (AE-5 / /arena/build/). Fills the stages with no live cockpit feed (scout / corpus / publish) and the human-gate annotations; the SFT / smoke / lane / RLVR stages are read live off their existing feeds and override these where present. Read by GET /api/build via FK_ARENA_BUILD_DIR (default this dir). Per-stage `artifacts` declarations (AE-26) are VERIFIED against the disk at read time — paths relative to this dir, `rows` claims a JSONL line count.
